assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states PDBs are a common cause and includes a section 'Restrictive PodDisruptionBudgets' as the first common blocking scenario

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' command in the pod drainage issues section

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Provides multiple commands including 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running,status.phase!=Succeeded' and commands to find pods with local storage

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Section 5 includes 'kubectl top nodes' and 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -A5 "Allocated resources"' to check for resource constraints

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl patch pdb <PDB_NAME> -n <NAMESPACE> -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":0}}'' command to temporarily relax PDB

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic force-drain after 1 hour

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Section 6 shows surge upgrade configuration with 'max-surge-upgrade=2 --max-unavailable-upgrade=0' and mentions it's for 'faster, more reliable upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Response does not mention webhooks as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Response does not include specific validation steps to confirm the upgrade fix is working properly

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE's disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration
